name: Discrete-Event Simulation (DES)
applicable_scenarios: simulate systems whose state changes at discrete events (arrivals, completions, failures)
complex queueing networks that defy closed-form analysis
common_pitfalls: results are stochastic; always run multiple replications and report CIs
warm-up period bias — discard initial transient before collecting statistics
rare events need long runs or importance-sampling variants
random-number stream management is critical for reproducible experiments
